Tushar Lab

Contact

We welcome inquiries from prospective students, collaborators, and the broader research community.

Email

ftushar@arizona.edu

Address

University of Arizona, Tucson, AZ 85721

GitHub

https://github.com/fitushar

For Prospective Students

If you are interested in joining the lab as a PhD student or postdoc, please email with the subject line [Application — your intended role]. Attach your CV and a brief (1-page) statement of research interests.

View Open Positions →

For Collaborators

We are open to research collaborations with clinical, industrial, and academic partners. Please describe your project or area of interest in your initial email.
